protocol.name: IndustReal staged dual-expert baseline
protocol.purpose: Measure the existing architecture before ROI evidence, MIL, or persistent belief tracking is introduced

cache_contract.strict_causal: trailing clips whose final source frame is not later than the prediction timestamp
cache_contract.rule: Never pool results from the two cache contracts; include the contract in every run name

protocol.test_policy: Select checkpoints and calibrate thresholds on validation. Evaluate the official test once after the three-seed development decision is frozen.

architecture.reason: Use the validated Large capacity rather than the 87.5M XL head: XL added little action quality and no fault recall. Isolate action and fault optimization while deliberately excluding new evidence sources.

stages.initialization: selected action checkpoint from the same seed and cache
stages.reason_for_legacy_selection: A baseline must remain measurable when exact validation event recall is zero. The stricter operational_harmonic selector is a subsequent deployment gate, not a prerequisite for producing the baseline.

stages.operation: Route action outputs from the action expert and event/state outputs from the adapted event expert; calibrate thresholds on validation only
